_comment: Roster for site/build_benchmark.py. NUMBERS come from the grade artifacts; this file only controls display. 'ingest' = grade cards merged (newest wins) into the cumulative 'store'. 'reports' maps a run id to its full per-run report URL (scored run names link there; 'report_fallback' is used otherwise). 'demo_groups' = the public Demo tables, one per group (T20S vs other datasets); each row is scored ('run' = a graded run id), a status placeholder ('status':'incomplete' = rollout not run, 'ungraded' = run exists but no current-scheme grade — each shown as a coloured pill), or a reference anchor ('note'). Every graded run also appears in 'Complete list'; 'complete_labels'/'complete_order' set its sub-label and order, 'complete_extra' adds outcome-only / reference rows.

rows.name: Golden
rows.note: Reference, not scored. Map-quality ceiling (1.0) at ≈3.15 Å.

rows.name: Floor
rows.note: Reference, not scored. Map-quality floor (0.0) at ≈4.35 Å; map similarity 0.038.

complete_extra.name: floor_min
complete_extra.note: Reference, not scored. Map-quality floor (0.0) at ≈4.35 Å; map similarity 0.038.
